rows.description: Compensation to Fellows Dry piece to Michs 1859
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected gemini-flash for more accurate description 'Dry piece' and 'Michs' over gpt-5-mini's 'Dry price' and 'Michl'.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'prizes' is more accurate. Visually, '1' is in the shillings column and '7' is in the pence column, not '17' in shillings. gpt-5-mini had significant misinterpretation of the amount.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually, this is a header for a braced group, and no amount aligns directly with this line. The amount '15 0 7' applies to the braced group below.
Selected gemini-flash. This is a clear sub-item within the 'Synodals & Procurations' braced group. gpt-5-mini missed this distinct row.

Selected gemini-flash. This is a clear sub-item within the 'Synodals & Procurations' braced group, and the group total '15 0 7' aligns with this line. gpt-5-mini missed this distinct row and attributed the total to the header.
Selected gpt-5-mini's row_type 'header' as more appropriate for a section label. Used gemini-flash's description 'Gardner' which is visually more accurate.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually, the shillings amount is clearly '14', not '4'.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually, the pence column is clearly blank, not explicitly '0'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Selected gemini-flash for more accurate description 'Michs' over gpt-5-mini's 'Michl'. Amounts agreed.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '3.9' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '3' and '9' as amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '4.2' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '4' and '2' as amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '12.18.6' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '12 18 6' as amounts and misread the description.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '3.18.6' is part of the description text (with 18s), and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '3 10 6' as amounts and misread '18' as '10'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '4' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '4' as an amount.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, this line has both a description 'Comm 12.12.1' and the total amount '33 6 3' for the preceding braced group. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the amount but missed the description and assigned 'total' type.
Selected gpt-5-mini's row_type 'header' as more appropriate for a section label. Amounts agreed.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '45.3.10' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '45 3 10' as amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, this line has both a description 'Tiles 40.' and the total amount '85 3 10' for the preceding braced group. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '40' as the amount for this line and then added an extra total row for the group.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually, 'Willden' is an entry with amount '5 9' in shillings and pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly added an extra 'Bill & Slates' row and misclassified 'Willden' as a header.
Selected gemini-flash and changed row_type to 'header'. Visually, 'Rowles' is a header for the following braced group. gpt-5-mini failed to identify this header.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '3.1.8' is part of the description text (and 'Bills' plural is correct), and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '3 1 8' as amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually, '14.4.1/2' is part of the description text, and no amounts are present in the main currency columns for this specific sub-item. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '14 4 0.5' as amounts and misread 'Sansom' as 'Sampson'.

Selected gpt-5-mini's row_type 'header' as more appropriate for a section label. Amounts agreed.
